Notice Of Motion And Motion To Transfer Venue, Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Feb-03-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JOHN COTA'S Motion To Transfer Venue PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 394. Appearances: Thomas S. Lakritz, Deputy City Attorney, CCSF, (415) 554-6547; appearing for Plaintiff, CCSF; and the People of the State of California; George M. Jones, Esq., of the Law Offices of Coppenrath & Associates (562) 216-2948, appearing for Defendant, John Cota, and moving party; Conte C. Cicala, Esq., of Flynn, Delich, & Wise, (415) 693-5566, appearing for Defendant Hanjin Shipping Co., Ltd.; There are no other appearances. Argued and The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. THIS MATTER IS TRANSFERRED TO CALIFORNIA SUPERIOR COURT, COUNTY OF MONTEREY FOR ALL FURTHER PROCEEDINGS. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/SK-X) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
